narrative:
Marion (precinct in Fayette County) has 489 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
